payload.title: Eval runner: silent skip on unknown task ids + misleading docs
payload.description: run_cross_provider.py silently skips unknown task ids ('warning: unknown task id X, skipping') and still prints 'Run NNN complete' afterward. NOTES.md (eval/runs/005/NOTES.md) advertises '--tasks 11,12,13,14,15' but tasks.toml ids are full strings like '11-pipeline'. So the documented command runs zero tasks and reports success. Fix: hard-error on unknown ids, and update NOTES.md + the runner's --tasks default + docstring example to use real ids.
